body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces a major refactoring to support multiple agent backends, specifically adding support for Codex alongside the existing Claude integration. The core of the change is an adapter pattern that abstracts backend-specific logic for terminal commands, session file paths, and transcript parsing. The changes are extensive, touching state management, persistence, file watching, and the webview UI to make them backend-agnostic. My review focuses on the implementation of this new architecture and opportunities for code simplification. I've identified a few areas where error handling could be improved and code duplication can be reduced.
**Devin Review** found 2 potential issues. View 7 additional findings in Devin Review.

**Actionable comments posted: 5**
🧹 Nitpick comments (4)
webview-ui/src/components/BottomToolbar.tsx (1)
`79-90`: **Agent 열기 전송 경로를 하나로 통일하면 유지보수가 쉬워집니다.** 현재는 단일 루트와 멀티 루트에서 서로 다른 경로(`onOpenAgent` vs 직접 `postMessage`)를 탑니다. `onOpenAgent(folderPath?)` 형태로 통일하면 메시지 스키마 변경 시 한 곳만 수정하면 됩니다.
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@webview-ui/src/components/BottomToolbar.tsx` around lines 79 - 90, Unify the open-agent message path by changing onOpenAgent to accept an optional folderPath and centralize the postMessage logic there; update handleAgentClick to call onOpenAgent() for the single-root case and update handleFolderSelect to call onOpenAgent(folder.path) instead of calling vscode.postMessage directly, and ensure onOpenAgent(folderPath?) constructs and posts the { type: 'openAgent', folderPath } message so all message-sending flows go through onOpenAgent. ```
webview-ui/src/office/toolUtils.ts (1)
`2-23`: **상태 매핑 문자열을 `webview-ui/src/constants.ts`로 이동해 중앙화해 주세요.** 현재 상태 접두사/도구 매핑이 로컬 하드코딩이라 다른 UI 모듈과 규칙/문구가 쉽게 드리프트할 수 있습니다. 상수 파일로 올려 재사용 포인트를 단일화하는 편이 유지보수에 안전합니다. As per coding guidelines "Centralize all magic numbers and strings in constants files: `src/constants.ts` for backend ... and `webview-ui/src/constants.ts` for webview ...".
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@webview-ui/src/office/toolUtils.ts` around lines 2 - 23, The STATUS_TO_TOOL mapping is hardcoded in toolUtils.ts; move it into the central webview constants module as an exported constant (export const STATUS_TO_TOOL = ...) and then replace the local declaration in toolUtils.ts with an import of STATUS_TO_TOOL from that constants module; update any usages that reference STATUS_TO_TOOL to use the imported symbol and remove the duplicate array to centralize the mapping for reuse across UI modules. ```
src/adapters/shared.ts (1)
`28-36`: **파일 읽기 최적화 고려 (선택 사항)** `readFirstJsonlRecord`가 첫 번째 줄만 필요하지만 전체 파일을 메모리에 로드합니다. 대부분의 경우 JSONL 파일이 작을 때 체크되므로 문제없지만, 대용량 파일의 경우 스트림 기반 읽기를 고려할 수 있습니다.
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@src/adapters/shared.ts` around lines 28 - 36, readFirstJsonlRecord currently reads the entire file into memory; change it to stream only until the first newline by using a fs.createReadStream piped into readline.createInterface (or using fs.open + a small buffer read) so you stop after reading the first line, parse that line and return the JSON object (or null on empty/parse error), and ensure errors are handled and the stream/interface is closed; update the function readFirstJsonlRecord to implement this streaming approach while preserving its return type Record | null. ```
src/adapters/codexAdapter.ts (1)
`24-26`: **사용하지 않는 `sessionId` 파라미터 처리 권장** `getTerminalCommand` 메서드에서 `sessionId` 파라미터가 사용되지 않습니다. `noUnusedParameters` 컴파일러 옵션을 준수하려면 밑줄 접두사를 추가하세요.
♻️ 수정 제안 ```diff - getTerminalCommand() { + getTerminalCommand(_sessionId) { return CODEX_SESSION_COMMAND; }, ```
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. In `@src/adapters/codexAdapter.ts` around lines 24 - 26, The getTerminalCommand method currently declares a sessionId parameter that is unused (getTerminalCommand) — to satisfy noUnusedParameters, rename the parameter to _sessionId (or prefix with an underscore) so the compiler treats it as intentionally unused, leaving the method body returning CODEX_SESSION_COMMAND unchanged; update the method signature where it's declared (getTerminalCommand) to use the underscored parameter name. ```
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. Inline comments: In @.vscode/launch.json: - Around line 8-20: Fix the inconsistent indentation inside the "Run Extension" launch configuration: align the opening brace for the object and its closing brace to the same indentation level as the surrounding launch configurations and make the "preLaunchTask" property's indentation match the other properties ("name", "type", "request", "args", "outFiles"). Locate the object with "name": "Run Extension" and adjust whitespace so all properties use the same indentation (and the surrounding braces use that same level) to ensure consistent formatting across the JSON file. In `@src/adapters/shared.ts`: - Around line 50-53: The equality check can fail due to case differences; ensure paths are compared case-insensitively by normalizing case (e.g., toLowerCase()) when normalizing paths. Update normalizeWorkspacePath (or apply .toLowerCase() where normalizeWorkspacePath is used) so that normalizedCwd and the normalized folder path (normalizeWorkspacePath(folder.uri.fsPath)) both produce lowercased canonical strings before the === comparison involving workspaceFolders and folder.uri.fsPath. In `@src/constants.ts`: - Line 38: The constant CODEX_SESSION_COMMAND is currently hardcoded to 'codex', which causes the runtime-generated sessionId and JSONL transcript path to be lost and leads to cross-session transcript mixing; change the design so CODEX_SESSION_COMMAND is not a fixed string but built dynamically (or replaced by a factory/function) to include the current sessionId and/or the JSONL path at runtime; update all references that expect CODEX_SESSION_COMMAND (and any code reading sessionId or JSONL paths) to call the new builder (or accept a session-scoped value) so each concurrent session resolves to its own unique command/path based on sessionId. In `@src/fileWatcher.ts`: - Around line 188-223: When reassigning a JSONL file you must also update the agent's adapter and file fields so the agent uses the correct adapter implementation; locate reassignAgentToFile and ensure it sets agent.adapterName = adapterName and agent.jsonlFile = newFilePath (or the incoming file path) when rebinding, so that subsequent calls (e.g., processTranscriptLine) use the new adapter; also ensure the callers from the branches using activeAgentIdRef.current and activeTerminalOwnerId pass the correct adapterName if not already. In `@src/types.ts`: - Around line 25-29: The PersistedAgent interface currently requires adapterName which will break restoration of older saved records; make adapterName optional on PersistedAgent (e.g., adapterName?: AgentBackend) and update the restore path that reads workspaceState 'pixel-agents.agents' (the code that hydrates persisted agents) to fill in a sensible default backend when adapterName is missing or undefined; ensure any functions/class methods that consume PersistedAgent (references to PersistedAgent, AgentBackend, and the restore/rehydrate routine) handle the optional field safely. --- Nitpick comments: In `@src/adapters/codexAdapter.ts`: - Around line 24-26: The getTerminalCommand method currently declares a sessionId parameter that is unused (getTerminalCommand) — to satisfy noUnusedParameters, rename the parameter to _sessionId (or prefix with an underscore) so the compiler treats it as intentionally unused, leaving the method body returning CODEX_SESSION_COMMAND unchanged; update the method signature where it's declared (getTerminalCommand) to use the underscored parameter name. In `@src/adapters/shared.ts`: - Around line 28-36: readFirstJsonlRecord currently reads the entire file into memory; change it to stream only until the first newline by using a fs.createReadStream piped into readline.createInterface (or using fs.open + a small buffer read) so you stop after reading the first line, parse that line and return the JSON object (or null on empty/parse error), and ensure errors are handled and the stream/interface is closed; update the function readFirstJsonlRecord to implement this streaming approach while preserving its return type Record | null. In `@webview-ui/src/components/BottomToolbar.tsx`: - Around line 79-90: Unify the open-agent message path by changing onOpenAgent to accept an optional folderPath and centralize the postMessage logic there; update handleAgentClick to call onOpenAgent() for the single-root case and update handleFolderSelect to call onOpenAgent(folder.path) instead of calling vscode.postMessage directly, and ensure onOpenAgent(folderPath?) constructs and posts the { type: 'openAgent', folderPath } message so all message-sending flows go through onOpenAgent. In `@webview-ui/src/office/toolUtils.ts`: - Around line 2-23: The STATUS_TO_TOOL mapping is hardcoded in toolUtils.ts; move it into the central webview constants module as an exported constant (export const STATUS_TO_TOOL = ...) and then replace the local declaration in toolUtils.ts with an import of STATUS_TO_TOOL from that constants module; update any usages that reference STATUS_TO_TOOL to use the imported symbol and remove the duplicate array to centralize the mapping for reuse across UI modules. ```
---
ℹ️ Review info
⚙️ Run configuration **Configuration used**: Organization UI **Review profile**: CHILL **Plan**: Pro **Run ID**: `95540c8a-6589-42df-a8eb-fc94beb0ae14`
📥 Commits Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between 3de6284dc603b241cf325258eeec0bd952f588a0 and 6c23543ed6fe5cc81032d5bf420a27d80a45e17a.
📒 Files selected for processing (18) * `.vscode/launch.json` * `CLAUDE.md` * `README.md` * `src/PixelAgentsViewProvider.ts` * `src/adapters/claudeAdapter.ts` * `src/adapters/codexAdapter.ts` * `src/adapters/shared.ts` * `src/agentAdapter.ts` * `src/agentManager.ts` * `src/constants.ts` * `src/fileWatcher.ts` * `src/transcriptParser.ts` * `src/types.ts` * `webview-ui/src/App.tsx` * `webview-ui/src/components/BottomToolbar.tsx` * `webview-ui/src/hooks/useEditorActions.ts` * `webview-ui/src/office/toolUtils.ts` * `webview-ui/test/tool-utils.test.ts`
